markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress, the new content calendar, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Calendar Approved:** The 75-topic calendar is ready for review, with a strategy to build a baseline on core security topics before expanding to verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking Enhanced:** The Looker dashboard will now track all legacy content, providing a complete performance picture for execs. A Slack automation will also notify the team of new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Prompt Injection Article Drafted:** A rewritten draft is ready for feedback on voice, tone, and product integration. Dave will add inline images using an AI tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Strategy Defined:** The plan is to drive LLM traffic to product pages by linking them from new, high-ranking blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar & Strategy

  - [The new content calendar is live in Airtable with 75 topics across 10 clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Source:** Competitor keyword analysis and internal documentation (e.g., Stephanie's threat doc).](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Includes emerging threats (e.g., RAG security, AI fuzzing) with low current search volume but high future potential.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Initial Strategy:** Build a baseline on core topics (AI governance, compliance, shadow AI) before expanding to verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The blog is new and needs to establish authority first.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Vertical Content:** Must include a security angle in titles to compete with non-security platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Review:** Use Airtable comments to tag Aida with feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Notifications:** A Slack automation will announce new drafts for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Access:** Stephanie will add Dan and Rick to Airtable and Google Docs for exec visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

### Performance Tracking & Reporting

  - [The Looker dashboard combines data from GA4 and Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Enhancement:** The dashboard will now track all legacy content, not just new GrowthX articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a complete performance picture for execs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** The blog gets significant traffic from ChatGPT and Perplexity, but product pages do not.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Link product pages from new, high-ranking blog content to drive LLM traffic deeper into the site.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**"Not Set" Traffic:** A portion of traffic is labeled "not set" in GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
      - [**Cause:** A known GA4 issue (e.g., cookie permissions, ad blockers), not a tracking error.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [**Bot Traffic:** Dave asked about distinguishing human vs. bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida will research available tracking methods.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)

### Prompt Injection Article Review

  - [A rewritten draft of the prompt injection article is ready for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [**Focus:** In-depth analysis of prompt injection and chatbot hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**SEO Tactics:** Includes a "Key Takeaway" section and FAQ for LLM citation growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Inline Images:** GrowthX cannot create inline images at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Solution:** Dave will create diagrams using an AI tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Content Placement:** Stephanie proposed a workflow to determine if articles belong on the main blog or Learning Center.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Main blog content is used by the sales team and distributed via email campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Traffic Forecasting & Expectations

  - [A forecast chart was shared, based on the monthly search volumes of the 75 target keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Caveat:** This is a conservative estimate, as articles often rank for many keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Expectations:** Sharat asked for a benchmark for "good" traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Context (Dave):** The industry is new, so keyword search volumes are low. Traffic growth will be slower than for legacy security topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**Action (Aida):** Will provide traffic data from other security clients, noting that domain authority is a key variable.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

### Check That Workspace

  - [Aida added the team to the Check That workspace, which is tracking 63 prompts based on the content calendar's keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [**Access Issue:** Dave reported an error preventing access.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
      - [**Solution:** Create a free workspace to unlock access to shared workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Witness.ai Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Review the prompt injection article draft and provide feedback on voice, tone, and product mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Review the content calendar in Airtable and add comments for prioritization or removal.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Create a free Check That workspace to access the shared workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
      - [Provide Aida with a list of emails for Dan and Rick to grant them access to all documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Set up the Slack automation to notify the team of new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to track all legacy content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Provide traffic data from other security clients to benchmark expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
      - [Research methods for tracking human vs. bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qsryr3pJf-emBo_75fXswUsZ4zehzFfe?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
